title: Introduction to Week 5
text:
[MUSIC]
This week, we'll review what we've
learned about key and harmonisation--
now with a practice-oriented view.
Through John's demonstrations and keyboard performances,
we'll explore how some of the chord inversions and
harmonic sequences that you've
learned about work in practice.
We'll also introduce you to some new cadences,
and explain how they shape
the structure of a musical composition,
and we'll explain the idea of modulation.
When you come to the end of this week,
you'll have completed all the
learning materials for the course.
The quiz is a little bit sneaky.
It's designed to challenge
you and use all your music theory knowledge.
So, take your time again here and remember to review
explanations from earlier weeks if you need to.
Then, if you wish, you can
proceed to the final assignment
in Week 6 to bring
together everything you've learned in the course.
We've set a peer-assessed music analysis task for you.
So, congratulations for reaching the end of the course!
We really hope you enjoyed it.
